styleBase: Viral TikTok-style vertical video for a premium kids beauty brand, 8 seconds, designed to loop perfectly. Starts INSTANTLY mid-action with a visual surprise in the first second, no slow intro, no fade-in, snappy comedic timing, a punchline in the final second that loops seamlessly back to the first frame. Pastel baby pink and sky blue dreamy world, glossy premium surfaces, sparkles used sparingly, wholesome kid-friendly humor, premium production quality, satisfying ASMR-adjacent motion, no people, no hands, no on-screen text, no captions
audioBase: Audio: cute toy sounds, soft satisfying pops and boings, gentle sparkle chimes, playful lighthearted music, no voices, no words, no singing
ambientBase: Ambient website background video, 8 seconds, designed to loop seamlessly — the last frame flows back into the first. Extremely slow, calm, continuous motion with no cuts, no camera shake, no sudden changes, no focal subject in the center of frame, low contrast and soft pastel tones so large headline text stays perfectly readable on top. Dreamy, premium, serene. No people, no products, no text, no logos. Audio: near-silent soft airy ambience

items.prompt: The clear gloss tube stands still for half a beat, then a vivid pink bloom IGNITES at the bottom of the formula and swirls upward through the clear gloss like ink in water, mesmerizing macro magic, the whole tube blushes fully pink, glows proudly, then the pink dissolves back to clear in one elegant swirl so it can bloom again — perfect loop. Keep the product design and label exactly as shown

The glitter gloss tube starts shaking like a tiny maraca, the shimmer inside swirling into a glitter tornado, it hops in a little circle to the beat, then freezes mid-hop with every glitter particle suspended in perfect formation, holds one smug beat, and drops back into the shake — perfect loop. Keep the product design and label exactly as shown

The jelly inside the jar bounces up against the glass with a squishy wobble, each bounce higher and jigglier, until it presses flat against the glass toward the camera like a face-squish against a window, slides down slowly, and plops back to bounce again — perfect loop. Keep the product design and label exactly as shown

The double-ended gloss spins its two capped ends in opposite directions like a tiny disagreement, tugs itself left and right, then SNAPS both ends together in sync with a satisfying click and a small pink-blue sparkle burst, holds one proud beat, and starts spinning apart again — perfect loop. Keep the product design and label exactly as shown

The roller gloss zooms into frame on its rollerball tip like a race car with a shimmer trail, screeches to a cartoon stop, teeters on the edge of tipping, wobbles dramatically, rights itself with a proud hop, then zooms out of frame the way it came — perfect loop. Keep the product design and label exactly as shown

This exact plush character chases a runaway lip gloss tube that rolls in circles around it, the character spins, trips over its own fluff, tumbles in a soft somersault, sits up dizzy with stars circling its head, spots the gloss again and lunges — perfect loop. Keep the plush character design exactly as shown

This exact plush character admires itself in a small round vanity mirror, strikes three increasingly dramatic poses, blows a kiss at its reflection, then the reflection winks back independently and the character does a shocked double-take, looks at the camera, then goes back to posing — perfect loop. Keep the plush character design exactly as shown

This exact plush character pushes a gift box lid open from INSIDE the box, pops its head out covered in a piece of tissue paper like a tiny ghost, shakes it off, celebrates with confetti, then ducks back into the box and the lid closes — perfect loop. Keep the plush character design exactly as shown

This exact plush character yawns hugely, curls up next to a small jar of lip sleeping mask hugging it like a teddy bear, drifts off with a tiny snore bubble growing and shrinking, then the alarm-like sparkle pops the bubble, it startles awake, blinks, and immediately yawns again — perfect loop. Keep the plush character design exactly as shown

Three premium plush characters — a baby lioness cub with a pink mane, a chubby white cloud, and a round pink jelly — do a synchronized happy dance in a line, bouncing left, bouncing right, one big jump together with a confetti pop, then land back in starting position — perfect loop

A plush baby lioness cub tiptoes dramatically across the frame carrying a lip gloss tube almost as big as itself, freezes mid-step looking at the camera like it has been caught, holds a long guilty stare, then continues tiptoeing twice as fast out of frame as the gloss wobbles — perfect loop

This exact plush character sprints after a rolling gloss tube across a fluffy cloud floor, little legs a comic blur, the gloss hops over a gap between clouds, the character skids to a stop at the edge, gulps, backs up, takes a running leap and sails across — landing right where the chase began, perfect loop. Keep the plush character design exactly as shown

Satisfying premium ASMR unboxing come to life: the satin ribbon slides free and drifts away, holographic crinkle paper rises and settles, tiny heart confetti floats up catching the light, the gloss bottle lifts softly out of the box and hovers rotating slowly in soft pastel light, then everything settles gently back into place — perfect loop. Keep the box, products and all branding exactly as shown. Audio: gentle paper rustles, soft sparkle chimes, one cute magical pop, dreamy music

A tiny stage of clouds with an empty white pedestal under a golden spotlight, drumroll energy as sparkles gather, then a frosted gloss tube with a sky blue cap descends elegantly from above onto the pedestal, lands perfectly, the clouds burst with pastel confetti — then the gloss ascends back up and the confetti reverses, perfect loop

A pink satin curtain fills the frame, trembles with anticipation, then sweeps open dramatically to reveal a glowing lineup of frosted cosmetic products with sky blue caps standing in formation as confetti pops, holds the tableau one beat, then the curtain sweeps closed again — perfect loop

A mysterious product silhouette glows behind frosted glass, pink light pulsing softly like a heartbeat, one small circle of the frost clears teasingly showing a glimpse of a sky blue cap, then the frost creeps back over it — perfect loop, suspenseful but cute

A sealed pink gift box sits alone under a soft spotlight, perfectly still, then starts shaking with growing excitement, golden light leaking from under the lid, lifts one centimeter — almost opening — then settles back down innocently still — perfect loop, maximum anticipation

A tiny gloss tube stands on a vast empty pink cloudscape, the camera pulls back to reveal it is standing on the very top of a colossal white pedestal towering through the clouds, a golden light crowns it, thunderclap of sparkles — then the camera dives back down to the intimate close-up, perfect loop, epic scale contrast

Hundreds of pink paint swatch cards rain in slow motion around a single clear gloss tube, it glows, and one perfect shade of pink blooms inside the formula while all the falling cards fade to grey — then the bloom retreats and the colorful rain begins again, perfect loop, the feeling of finding YOUR color

Extreme macro: a drop of crystal clear gloss falls in slow motion, lands on a glossy white surface, and blooms into vivid pink on impact, the pink spreading in gorgeous fractal swirls, deeply satisfying, then the swirl reverses and the drop lifts back up — perfect loop

A gloss tube on a marble pedestal is lit like a luxury perfume commercial, slow orbiting camera, dramatic shadows — then a tiny plush cloud waddles in, places a small knitted pink bow on the tube, pats it gently and waddles away as the tube preens — perfect loop, luxury meets adorable

Three plush inspectors — a lioness cub, a cloud and a jelly — examine a gloss tube with tiny magnifying glasses, nod at each other with adorable seriousness, and stamp a big pink heart seal in the air above it which bursts into confetti — then they immediately begin inspecting again, perfect loop

A gift box wraps ITSELF: paper folds crisply around it, ribbon spirals on and ties into a perfect bow, a gift tag flutters down and lands — the box does a happy little hop — then the wrapping elegantly unwinds and begins again, perfect loop, deeply satisfying

A gloss tube struts down a tiny pink runway between velvet ropes, sparkle flashes popping like paparazzi, it stops, strikes a pose, the crowd of tiny plush toys goes wild throwing confetti — then it turns and struts back up the runway to start again, perfect loop, main-character energy

A slow dreamy flight through a miniature world of floating cloud islands — past a gloss tube tower, under a rainbow bridge, around a gift box house where a plush cub waves — ending exactly where the flight began, perfect loop, storybook wonder

A pink crate drops from the sky under a parachute of pastel balloons, lands softly on clouds, its walls fall open revealing products standing in perfect glowing formation, confetti bursts — then the walls fold back up and the crate launches skyward again, perfect loop, drop-day hype

A pastel vending machine hums, a capsule with a gloss tube inside tumbles down in slow motion, lands in the tray with a satisfying clunk, the capsule opens and glows gold — then it closes and floats back up into the machine, perfect loop, collector thrill

A tower of pastel gift boxes wobbles, the top box lid pops open and a gloss tube rises out on a beam of golden light, rotating slowly like a treasure, tiny hearts float up — then it sinks back in and the lid closes with a wink of light, perfect loop

First-person dreamy dolly toward a glowing vanity mirror flanked by fairy lights, LeoNes products arranged perfectly on the white desk, drawers opening by themselves revealing color-sorted gloss collections, deeply aspirational and satisfying, camera pulls back to the start — perfect loop

A line of gloss tubes topples in a satisfying domino run across a pink shelf, each falling into a soft cushion, the last one lands upright perfectly on a tiny pedestal and sparkles smugly — then they all spring back up in reverse, perfect loop

Three gloss tubes race on rollerball tips down a soft pink slide track with banked curves, photo-finish at a ribbon, the winner gets a tiny gold crown dropped onto its cap and does a victory spin — then they all zoom back to the starting line, perfect loop

Soft white and pink-tinted clouds drifting very slowly from right to left across a pastel sky blue to baby pink gradient sky, gentle volumetric light, clouds staying near the edges of frame leaving the center airy and open

A barely-shifting gradient of cloud white, baby pink and pale sky blue like slow watercolor mixing, a handful of tiny distant sparkles fading in and out very gently near the corners, almost imperceptible breathing motion
Extreme close-up of baby pink silk fabric undulating in ultra slow motion like calm water, soft light sweeping across the folds very gradually, luxurious and hypnotic

Vertical dreamy sky: soft pink-tinted clouds drifting very slowly upward past frame like a gentle ascent, pastel gradient from sky blue at top to baby pink at bottom, tiny distant stars twinkling faintly near the top
Vertical soft gradient of white, pink and pale blue with fine glitter bokeh particles floating upward extremely slowly like dust in sunlight, denser near the bottom edge, center kept clean and calm

Keep these exact plush characters identical. A cozy pajama party sleepover: the plush squad wearing tiny pastel pajamas and nightcaps, sitting on fluffy blankets and pillows among warm fairy lights, one slowly sipping from a tiny mug of pink milk, another nodding off and gently tipping sideways, a string of soft glowing lights twinkling very slowly, warm and dreamy nighttime palette, extremely gentle cozy motion

Keep these exact plush characters identical. Vertical cozy sleepover scene: the plush squad in tiny pastel pajamas snuggled in a pillow fort, fairy lights twinkling slowly above them, one character's chest rising and falling in gentle sleep, a tiny star mobile rotating very slowly overhead, warm dreamy night palette, extremely gentle motion

A long white shelf of frosted cosmetic products with sky blue caps against baby pink, tiny gold sparkles drifting past extremely slowly like dust in sunlight, one soft light sweep traveling across the glossy products over the full duration, calm retail dreaminess

Extreme macro of vivid pink pigment swirling in crystal clear liquid in ultra slow motion, gorgeous ink-in-water fractal wisps curling and unfurling endlessly, soft white background, hypnotic and elegant

A pink gift box with a satin bow sitting in soft light, the gap under its lid glowing warmly and pulsing very slowly like a heartbeat, tiny hearts of light floating up from it occasionally and fading, calm and magical

A dreamy pastel night sky in soft plum and dusty pink, tiny gold stars twinkling gently at different rhythms, a sliver of crescent moon glowing softly, one slow shooting star crossing far in the distance, serene bedtime calm
Sparse pastel confetti pieces and tiny gold stars falling extremely slowly like snow across a soft white-pink gradient, gentle rocking as they drift, celebratory but calm and unobtrusive

Soft translucent pink and iridescent bubbles rising extremely slowly through a pale gradient like a gentle lava lamp, occasionally one bubble softly popping into a tiny sparkle, dreamy laboratory calm

A plain pink phone case gets bombed with cute stickers that fly in one by one and slap on — hearts, stars, a cloud, a lioness paw — building to a fully decorated masterpiece, a gloss tube rolls in and takes a proud spot beside it — then the stickers pop off one by one and it starts again, perfect loop
